title: Umayyah b. 'Abdallah Kills Bukayr b. Wishal} in Khurasan
description: in Khurdsan According to'Ali b. Mul}ammad597-al-Mufad4al b. Muhammad: Umayyah b. 'Abdallah, 'Abd al- Malik 's governor over Khurasan, put Bukayr in charge of the campaign in Transoxania. He had earlier put him in charge of Tukharistan, and Bukayr had made his preparations for setting out for it and spent a great deal of money; but then Babir b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 22
